title: Increase compile spead using go build -i
body:
Brent found a feature in go that implements --incremental builds
Basically this flag caused builds to happen much quicker, making
developers lifes happier.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM as long as make clean will wipe the cache.
I am going to close this one, since I don't see the speedup from build -i.
